news.headline: Japan to Increase Monthly IDECO Limit by 7,000 Yen: Nikkei
Global iron castings market to grow by $50.34 billion from 2024 to 2028, with 68% growth in APAC driven by AI technology.
news.summary: In a recent report detailing the impact of AI on market dynamics, it is projected that the global iron castings market will witness a significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 50.34 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research conducted by Technavio forecasts a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.98% during this period, indicating substantial developments in the market landscape.

news.headline: STRATTEC SECURITY CORPORATION plans to sell its Milwaukee facility for upgraded operations.
news.summary: A well-known company in the automotive industry, STRATTEC SECURITY CORPORATION (Nasdaq: STRT), based in Milwaukee, has disclosed plans to list its facility for sale. By doing so, the company aims to explore avenues for enhancing and modernizing its operations. This initiative involves assessing potential manufacturing spaces and office accommodations for optimized functioning. STRATTEC specializes in providing smart solutions for vehicle power access, security, and authorization globally.

news.headline: American Lending Center approved by USCIS to finance new rural hospital in Missouri to create jobs.
news.summary: American Lending Center, based in Irvine, California, has recently been granted approval by the United States Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) to enable visa-based investors to fund a new critical care hospital in rural Missouri. This approval allows the Harrison County Community Hospital in Bethany, Missouri to benefit from the newly established USCIS public infrastructure category, as it has generated a significant number of construction and permanent jobs. With this approval, the Harrison Hospital project has successfully met the requirements set by the USCIS for facilitating foreign investment in public infrastructure projects.

news.headline: Ponce Financial Group to attend virtual bank conference hosted by Sycamore Analytics and Pendragon Capital Management on Dec 11, 2024. Register at www.VirtualBankConference.com.
news.summary: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. disclosed plans to participate in a virtual bank conference organized by Sycamore Analytics and Pendragon Capital Management on December 11, 2024, between 1:05 to 1:35 PM EST. The company, acting as the holding entity for Ponce Bank, will be presenting during this event. For those interested in attending, registration is required via the website www.VirtualBankConference.com. Ponce Financial Group, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol PDLB.

news.headline: Global printers market to grow by $10.65 billion (2023-2028), driven by AI technology, at 3.46% CAGR - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of artificial intelligence on the market, with projections suggesting a significant growth in the global printers market. Estimates indicate a substantial increase of USD 10.65 billion between 2024 and 2028. During this period, the market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.46%.

news.headline: South Korea president faces unfortunate timing.
ROHM partners with TSMC to develop GaN power devices for electric vehicles to meet demand for high-voltage, high-frequency properties.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Santa Clara, CA and Kyoto, Japan, ROHM Co., Ltd. (ROHM) revealed a strategic collaboration with TSMC for the advancement and large-scale manufacturing of gallium nitride (GaN) power devices intended for electric vehicles. This partnership merges ROHM's device development proficiency with TSMC's cutting-edge GaN-on-silicon process technology to address the increasing necessity for enhanced high-voltage and high-frequency characteristics compared to silicon in power devices.

news.headline: Mawson Infrastructure Group Inc. reveals November 2024 operational update, with key details.
news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The economy has added 250,000 new jobs, with the majority of the growth coming from the healthcare and technology sectors. Additionally, the average hourly wage has increased by 3.2% compared to last year. These positive indicators suggest a strong and thriving economy with a robust job market.

news.headline: Summit Hotel Properties to acquire two hotels in a $96 million deal with GIC joint venture.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on December 10, 2024, Summit Hotel Properties, Inc. (NYSE: INN) revealed that, alongside GIC, its joint venture, it has entered into an agreement to purchase the 250-room Hampton Inn Boston - Logan Airport and the 149-room Hilton Garden Inn.

news.headline: Private & public cloud market in financial services to grow by $106.43 billion (2024-2028) due to Big Data AI trends.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, it was reported that the financial services industry is witnessing a transformation in the market landscape due to the integration of artificial intelligence. A study conducted by Technavio forecasts a significant growth in the private and public cloud market within this industry, with an estimated increase of USD 106.43 billion anticipated between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to expand at a steady pace during this period, showcasing the increasing influence and adoption of AI technologies in reshaping the sector.

news.headline: Cellectar Biosciences is reviewing options for late-stage drug iopofosine I 131, with strong Phase 2 data for a market opportunity.
news.summary: Assessing potential strategies for Iopofosine I 131, a late-stage clinical program showcasing promising results from Phase 2 trials and significant market prospects.

news.headline: Micron chip triumph, Omnicom and Interpublic merger Tech.
news.summary: In recent data, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, reaching a record low in the past decade. The economy has seen an increase in job creation, with over 250,000 new jobs added to the market last month. The average hourly wage has also risen by 3.5% compared to the previous year, showing positive growth in the labor market. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a significant surge, with the main indices reaching all-time highs. Experts believe that these indicators reflect a strong and flourishing economy that is likely to continue its positive trend in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Ventas (NYSE: VTR) declares $0.45 dividend per common share, payable on Jan 16, 2025 to stockholders as of Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago, Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per common share, to be paid on January 16, 2025, to stockholders of record as of December 31, 2024. Ventas, a prominent S&P 500 real estate investment trust, focuses on creating high-quality living spaces for the expanding aging demographic.

news.headline: G.M. will halt self-driving taxi development to focus on autonomous vehicles for personal use.
news.summary: The company announced its decision to concentrate on the development of fully autonomous vehicles for individual use, shifting its focus towards this endeavor.

news.headline: American Water employees volunteer over 3,000 hours for AmerICANs in Action! Month of Service, across 84 projects.
news.summary: American Water, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility in the U.S., recently revealed the outcome of its companywide AmerICANs in Action! Month of Service. Over 900 staff members nationwide engaged in 84 community volunteer initiatives, collectively dedicating 3,000 hours to the cause. AmerICANs in Action seeks to motivate American Water employees and their associates, retirees, and business affiliates to give back to the community.

news.headline: Dr. Zachary Solomon Scholarship for Medical Students now open for applications for 2025 award to inspire medical innovators.
news.summary: The application process has opened for the 2025 Dr. Zachary Solomon Scholarship for Medical Students in Philadelphia on December 10, 2024. This scholarship aims to encourage and assist future medical innovators. Interested individuals can now apply for the prestigious award.

news.headline: Nutanix plans $750M convertible senior notes offering due 2029 to qualified institutional buyers, with option for $112.5M more.
news.summary: Nutanix, Inc., a major player in hybrid multicloud computing, revealed plans on Dec. 10, 2024, to offer $750 million in convertible senior notes due 2029 in a private placement. The offering is subject to market conditions and other factors, with the notes intended for qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. Additionally, Nutanix intends to provide the initial purchasers of the notes with the option to acquire up to an additional $112.5 million worth of notes within a 13-day period starting from the initial issuance date.

news.headline: Brookfield Corp prices $700M subordinated notes due 2055 in public offering.
news.summary: Today in Brookfield, a notable corporation known as Brookfield (NYSE: BN, TSX: BN) disclosed the pricing of a public offering. They announced the pricing of $700 million principal amount of subordinated notes due 2055.

news.headline: New Zealand Manufacturing Sales Actual -1.2% (Forecast -, Previous 0.6%)

December interest rate cut highly likely, with 86% chance of 25-basis-point reduction, lowering federal funds rate to 4.25%-4.5%. Markets await November CPI data, expecting 2.7% inflation increase. This could impact Federal Reserve's Dec. 18 meeting decision. #EconomicUpdate
news.summary: The November Consumer Price Index, released on Wednesday at 8:30 a.m. ET, holds significant importance for the upcoming Dec. 18 Federal Reserve meeting. There is an 86% probability, according to CME FedWatch, of a 25-basis-point rate cut. This cut would bring the federal funds rate down to a range of 4.25%-4.5%. The inflation data could be a deciding factor, potentially giving markets a boost for the year's end or disrupting the possibility of a Santa Claus Rally. Economists are predicting a rise in annual CPI inflation from 2.6% in October to 2.7% in November. This would be the second consecutive monthly increase, indicating sustained upward pressure. The forecast for monthly CPI growth is 0.3%, compared to the previous month's increase of 0.2%.

Cannabis sales down in Massachusetts and New Mexico; Massachusetts dispenser revenue dropped to $362k/month, down 8% YoY, in New Mexico sales went down 3% in November.
news.summary: The average revenue per dispensary in Massachusetts has decreased to $362,000 per month, down by 8% compared to the previous year. New Mexico experienced a 3% drop in sales during November. The cannabis industry in key U.S. markets like California, Massachusetts, and New Mexico are exhibiting varied performance. While California leads in tax revenue, the sales in Massachusetts and New Mexico have shown slight declines, indicating broader market trends.Massachusetts saw a total of $152 million in legal cannabis sales in November 2024, which was a 1% decrease from October but a 4% rise from November 2023. The accumulated sales for October and November totaled $305 million, marking a 5% decrease from the previous quarter. These figures suggest a potentially saturated market in Massachusetts. For more in-depth coverage, visit Benzinga.com and subscribe to their newsletter for free to stay updated on the latest news and analysis in the cannabis industry.

news.headline: Wavegate Corp secures $26M in Series A funding led by UCEA Capital Partners Ltd for neuromodulation tech for chronic pain.
news.summary: Wavegate Corporation, based in Lake Charles, Louisiana, announced on December 10, 2024, that they have successfully raised $26 million in their Series A funding round. The funding was led by UCEA Capital Partners Ltd., an investment firm based in London. Wavegate Corporation specializes in developing innovative neuromodulation technology designed for chronic pain management.

news.headline: ORTEC wins 2024 Top Software & Tech Award from Food Logistics & Supply & Demand Chain Executive.
news.summary: Recently in Atlanta on December 10, 2024, Food Logistics and Supply & Demand Chain Executive named ORTEC as a stand-out within the global cold food supply chain. Food Logistics focuses solely on product movement within the cold food supply chain, while Supply & Demand Chain Executive covers the broader global supply chain. ORTEC's recognition by these publications underscores its significance within the industry.

Toro Co. boosts quarterly cash dividend.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the economy grew by 3.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. The unemployment rate dropped to 4.2%, the lowest in five years. Additionally, the stock market saw a record high, with the main index increasing by 15% in the past year. This growth is attributed to increased consumer spending and a rise in exports. Experts predict that the trend will continue, leading to further economic prosperity in the coming months.

news.headline: NewAmsterdam Pharma starts $300M public offering of ordinary shares and pre-funded warrants for CVD medicines.
news.summary: NewAmsterdam Pharma Company N.V. announced the commencement of an underwritten public offering of $300.0 million of the Company’s ordinary shares, with nominal value €0.12 per share, and pre-funded warrants for certain investors. The Company also plans to grant underwriters a 30-day option to purchase up to an additional $45.0 million of shares. The proposed Offering's completion is subject to market conditions, and there is no assurance regarding its actual size or terms.

news.headline: New York Mortgage Trust declares $0.20 per share common stock dividend. Payable on Jan 23, 2025, for record holders by Dec 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, New York Mortgage Trust, Inc. (Nasdaq: NYMT) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share on its common stock for the period ending December 31, 2024. This dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, is set to be paid on January 23, 2025, to common stockholders recorded by December 20, 2024.

The global web hosting services market is projected to experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 124.2 billion expected between 2024 and 2028, as indicated by Technavio. This growth translates to a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 16.8% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: GameStop's Q3 revenue of $860.3M missed estimates, cash stands at $4B+, no offerings planned this fiscal year.
news.summary: GameStop Corp (NYSE:GME) recently released its third-quarter financial results after the market closed on Tuesday. The company reported total net sales of $860.3 million for the quarter, a decrease from last year's third-quarter total of $1.08 billion. This fell short of the Street consensus estimate of $887.7 million. Sales were broken down by segment as follows, with last year's third-quarter totals provided in parentheses: Hardware and accessories at $417.4 million ($579.4 million), software at $271.8 million ($321.3 million), and collectibles at $171.1 million ($177.6 million). All three segments experienced declines in sales compared to the previous year.

news.headline: Manulife re-appoints Ernst & Young LLP as external auditor. Board endorses decision.
news.summary: Manulife Financial Corporation, listed under TSX/NYSE/PSE as MFC and SEHK as 945, disclosed on Dec. 10, 2024, that its Board of Directors has approved the re-hiring of Ernst & Young LLP ("EY") as their auditor.

news.headline: US Ambassador to UK Hartley discusses 2025 Geopolitics.
Chainlink partners with Coinbase to enhance Project Diamond with secure data transmission and interoperability.
news.summary: Chainlink has been chosen to facilitate the transmission of verifiable data and crosschain interoperability for Coinbase's Project Diamond. With this collaboration, Chainlink will provide the necessary infrastructure to ensure secure and reliable data transmission. This partnership is set to enhance Coinbase's capabilities in processing and utilizing various forms of data. The move is also expected to boost Coinbase's overall efficiency and competitiveness in the market.

news.headline: Sportsman's Warehouse Holdings, Inc. reported a net loss of $0.4 million for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024, with net sales at $324.3 million, a decrease of 4.8% compared to the same period in 2023. Adjusted EBITDA was $16.4 million. For the thirty-nine weeks ended November 2, 2024, net sales were $857.2 million, a decrease of 6.6%, with a net loss of $24.3 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $15.1 million. The company adjusted its guidance for fiscal year 2024, expecting net sales in the $1.18 billion to $1.20 billion range and adjusted EBITDA to be between $23 million to $29 million. The company also expects total inventory to be below $350 million. CFO highlighted additional marketing pressures on margins and strategic inventory investments to improve sales during the season. Company plans to reduce inventory levels to generate positive free cash flow. Management remains focused on improving topline with margin and profitability in the mid and long term. Adjusted diluted earnings per share were $0.04 for the third quarter 2024, compared to adjusted diluted loss per share of $(0.01) in the same period of the prior year. Emphasis was placed on the balance sheet and ending the year with positive free cash flow. The financial results indicate ongoing efforts to navigate challenges in the current consumer environment while focusing on marketing initiatives and inventory management to drive sales.
news.summary: Sportsman's Warehouse Holdings, Inc. released its third-quarter financial results for the thirteen weeks ended November 2, 2024. Net sales were $324.3 million, a decrease of 4.8% compared to the same period in 2023. Same-store sales decreased by 5.7%, gross profit was $103.1 million, and adjusted EBITDA was $16.4 million. For the thirty-nine weeks ended November 2, 2024, net sales were $857.2 million, a decrease of 6.6% compared to the previous year. The company expects net sales and adjusted EBITDA for fiscal year 2024 to be in the range of $1.18 billion to $1.20 billion and $23 million to $29 million, respectively. The company plans to open one new store in fiscal year 2025, with total inventory expected to be below $350 million. The company emphasized traffic-driving marketing and product pricing initiatives to navigate the challenging consumer environment. Non-GAAP financial measures were included in the report, and the company addressed forward-looking statements and factors influencing future results. The company's net loss for the third quarter was $(0.4) million, compared to a net loss of $(1.3) million in the same quarter of 2023. Adjusted net income for the quarter was $1.4 million compared to an adjusted net loss of $(0.2) million in the third quarter of fiscal year 2023. Adjusted EBITDA was $16.4 million compared to $16.2 million in the third quarter of fiscal year 2023. The company ended the third quarter with net debt of $151.3 million and total liquidity of $150.8 million.

news.headline: Medicover AB (Publ) considering separate listing for Indian hospital subsidiary in India to boost growth in 12-24 months.
news.summary: The board of directors of Medicover AB (Publ) in Stockholm announced on December 10, 2024, their intention to assess the possibility of listing their Indian hospital subsidiary in India within the next 12-24 months. This move is aimed at bolstering the company's expansion efforts in the rapidly growing Indian market.

news.headline: Americans overwhelmingly oppose proposed Medicare cuts according to RPAN survey.Calls for Congress action.
news.summary: The Radiology Patient Action Network (RPAN) is urging Congress to take action before the end of the year. According to a recent national survey, a majority of Americans are against proposed Medicare reductions that would impact their healthcare. The findings highlight strong opposition to the cuts, emphasizing the importance of addressing this issue promptly.

news.headline: Eagle Materials to acquire Bullskin Stone & Lime, a Western PA aggregates business, for $152.5 million. Expected to close in 60 days.
news.summary: Dallas-based Eagle Materials Inc. (NYSE: EXP) has revealed its plans to acquire Bullskin Stone & Lime, LLC, an aggregates company in Western Pennsylvania, for a total of $152.5 million. Bullskin Stone & Lime, LLC focuses on serving the Pittsburgh area and the wider Western Pennsylvania region. The acquisition deal is set to be finalized in the upcoming two months, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.

news.headline: Abcourt Mines Inc. reports 97%+ votes for all resolutions at the Annual Shareholders Meeting on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Rouyn-Noranda, Quebec on December 10, 2024, Abcourt Mines Inc. ("Abcourt" or the "Corporation") (TSX Venture: ABI) (OTCQB: ABMBF) shared positive results from its Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. The Meeting saw the approval of all resolutions presented, with over 97% of shares voted in favor.

news.headline: American Strategic Investment Co. to sell its 9 Times Square property for $63.5 million; closing set for Dec 19, 2024. Buyer paid $7 million deposit.
news.summary: Today, American Strategic Investment Co. (NYSE: NYC) revealed that the sale of its 9 Times Square Midtown Manhattan property ("9 Times Square") is set to close on December 19, 2024. The contract sales price for the property is $63.5 million, with the buyer already submitting a $7 million non-refundable deposit. This transaction follows an amendment secured by the Company regarding the sale.

news.headline: Amgen declares $2.38 per share dividend for Q1 2025, to be paid on March 7, 2025.

Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) declared a dividend of $2.38 per share for the first quarter of 2025. This dividend is set to be paid on March 7, 2025, to all stockholders of record as of the end of business on a specified date.
